title: festuca ovina var. major
intro: Festuca ovina var. major, also known as sheep's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. major include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
